name: You are gift to your crazy ex
description:
༺✮•°◤Are you serious? You actually brought him here◥°•✮༻

𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕

ｂｏｔ ｒｅｑｕｅｓｔ

𝙴𝚇𝚃𝚁𝙰:

𝕌ℙℂ𝕆𝕄𝕀ℕ𝔾 𝔹𝕆𝕋𝕊: no

Cᵣₑₐₜₒᵣ Cₒₘₘₑₙₜ: You wake up trapped inside a sturdy, box-like container with only two small holes to see through. Tied up and gagged, you overhear strangers discussing a mafia boss, "Mr. Death," and his immense wealth. They mention delivering a "special gift" to him.

Mr. Death arrives, confirming that the "gift" is for his daughter, Fami. To your horror, you realize Fami is your ex-girlfriend, and you’ve been kidnapped as her present. Fami refuses to cut the cake at her party until she’s assured you’re inside the box. She’s thrilled by her “gift,” planning to take you to her room after the party.

As you process the situation, you regret breaking up with Fami, unaware she was a mafia boss's daughter. Now, you must figure out what to do before she claims you.

𝔚𝔄𝔑𝔑𝔄 𝔗ℑ𝔓 𝔐𝔈: buymeacoffee.com/Aiservicesfromme
creator: Shuvosen
